description: This clash started cheating because, according to her, one of our teammates was cheating. The way their cheat worked was that they could not be stunned in any way while holding their shield up. Even after a direct explosion on the shield, a stun grenade from zofia and multiple punches, she never ever got stunned like it would normally happen. If needed, I can post the other POVs with sound to show that the punches were actually hitting the shield.
